title: Login page not loading
description: User cannot access the login page due to server timeout.

title: Password reset email not received
description: Customer requested password reset but email was not delivered.

title: Typo in dashboard heading
description: Dashboard heading contains a spelling mistake.

title: Payment gateway error
description: Users are unable to complete payment using credit card.

title: Profile image upload failed
description: Uploading profile images returns a server error.

title: UI alignment issue
description: Buttons in settings page are not aligned properly.

title: Application crashes on mobile
description: The mobile version crashes when opening notifications.

title: Slow page loading
description: Dashboard takes more than 10 seconds to load.

title: Broken link in footer
description: Support page link in footer redirects to a 404 page.

title: Database connection error
description: Application fails to connect to the production database.

title: Search functionality not working
description: Search bar returns no results even for valid queries.

title: Notification icon missing
description: Notification icon does not appear in header.

title: Email notification delay
description: System notifications are delivered after several minutes.

title: Colour theme not applied
description: Dark mode theme is not applied after selection.
